role-reveal.description: RoleReveal phase opens: instructs all players to look at their role card
role-reveal.text: Everyone, look at your role card.

werewolves-meeting-close-eyes.description: WerewolvesMeeting phase opens: instructs werewolves to open their eyes and look at each other
werewolves-meeting-close-eyes.text: Werewolves, open your eyes. Look at the other werewolves, if there are any.

werewolves-meeting-solo.description: WerewolvesMeeting phase opens: exactly 1 werewolf in game — tells the lone werewolf to open their eyes
werewolves-meeting-solo.text: Werewolf, open your eyes. You are the only werewolf. Press Ready.

werewolves-meeting-duo.description: WerewolvesMeeting phase opens: exactly 2 werewolves in game — tells both werewolves to open their eyes and identify each other
werewolves-meeting-duo.text: Werewolves, open your eyes. Look at the other werewolf and press Ready.

werewolves-meeting-group.description: WerewolvesMeeting phase opens: 3 or more werewolves in game — tells the pack to open their eyes and look at each other
werewolves-meeting-group.text: Werewolves, open your eyes. Look at the other werewolves and press Ready.

night-announcement.description: NightAnnouncement phase opens: instructs everyone to close their eyes; the night is beginning
night-announcement.text: The night has fallen. Everyone, close your eyes.

day-announcement.description: DayAnnouncement phase opens: instructs everyone to open their eyes; the night has ended
day-announcement.text: The night has ended. Everyone, open your eyes.

werewolves-turn.description: WerewolvesTurn phase opens: instructs werewolves to open their eyes and silently pick a victim
werewolves-turn.text: Werewolves, open your eyes. Silently decide who to eliminate.

werewolves-turn-solo.description: WerewolvesTurn phase opens: exactly 1 werewolf in game — tells the lone werewolf to open their eyes and pick a victim
werewolves-turn-solo.text: Werewolf, open your eyes. Silently decide who to eliminate.

werewolves-turn-group.description: WerewolvesTurn phase opens: 2 or more werewolves in game — tells the pack to open their eyes and pick a victim
werewolves-turn-group.text: Werewolves, open your eyes. Silently decide who to eliminate.

cupid-turn.description: CupidTurn phase opens: instructs Cupid to open their eyes and point to two players to link as lovers
cupid-turn.text: Cupid, open your eyes. Select two players to link as lovers.

cupid-close-eyes.description: CupidCloseEyes phase opens: instructs Cupid to close their eyes before the night continues

lover-reveal.description: LoverReveal phase opens: instructs everyone to check their role card to see if they are a lover
lover-reveal.text: Everyone, check if you are one of the lovers.

seer-turn.description: SeerTurn phase opens: instructs the Seer to open their eyes and point to a player to inspect
seer-turn.text: Seer, open your eyes. Select a player to reveal their role.

seer-close-eyes.description: SeerCloseEyes phase opens: instructs the Seer to close their eyes before the night continues

witch-turn.description: WitchTurn phase opens: instructs the Witch to open their eyes and optionally use a potion
witch-turn.text: Witch, open your eyes. You may use your potions.

witch-close-eyes.description: WitchCloseEyes phase opens: instructs the Witch to close their eyes before the night ends

hunter-turn.description: HunterTurn phase opens (triggered when the Hunter is eliminated): instructs the Hunter to shoot one player
hunter-turn.text: Hunter, you have been eliminated. You can select someone to take with you.

night-end-no-deaths.description: NightEliminationReveal phase opens, nightDeaths is empty: announces no one was eliminated during the night

night-end-one-death.description: NightEliminationReveal phase opens, nightDeaths has 1 entry: announces one player was taken during the night

night-end-many-deaths.description: NightEliminationReveal phase opens, nightDeaths has 2+ entries: announces multiple players were taken during the night

discussion.description: Discussion phase opens: instructs all players to discuss and vote before the timer runs out
discussion.text: Everyone, discuss who you believe is a werewolf.

tiebreak-discussion.description: TiebreakDiscussion phase opens: instructs all players to revote between the tied candidates
tiebreak-discussion.text: There is a tie! Revote between the tied players.

day-elimination-tie.description: DayEliminationReveal phase opens, dayDeaths is empty: announces that the vote was tied and no one was eliminated
day-elimination-tie.text: The votes are tied. No one was eliminated.

day-elimination.description: DayEliminationReveal phase opens, dayDeaths has 1 entry: announces that the village has eliminated a player
day-elimination.text: The village has decided. Someone has been eliminated.

game-over-villagers.description: FinalScoresReveal phase opens, winner is Villagers: announces that the villagers win
game-over-villagers.text: The werewolves have been found! The villagers win!

game-over-werewolves.description: FinalScoresReveal phase opens, winner is Werewolves: announces that the werewolves win
game-over-werewolves.text: The werewolves have taken over the village! The werewolves win! Game over.

wolves-close-eyes.description: WolvesCloseEyes phase opens: instructs werewolves to close their eyes before the night continues
